name: Central Maine Power (ME)
_note: Avangrid CMP. PARKED disabled / needs-human. The candidate host below (from Maine GeoLibrary arcgis.com item 1d8d28803cd34b63aed57f91446bcfaf) does NOT resolve on public DNS: an introspection run on a GitHub-hosted runner (open egress, 2026-06-30) returned 'curl: (6) Could not resolve host: avangrid-maine-ags.esriemcs.com' for the service root + every layer. So this is genuinely unreachable, not just blocked by the dev sandbox — esriemcs appears internal/split-horizon. Field names are also UNVERIFIED placeholders. To enable: re-capture the REAL data endpoint from the live CMP outage map in a browser (DevTools network tab), confirm it resolves publicly, set config.base + config.fields.{out,etr,id} to the real values, verify via check_reconciliation, then remove this flag.
